title: sagus sagu
intro: Sagus sagu, also known as the Agathis tree or the Kauri, is a species of evergreen coniferous tree native to Australia and New Guinea. The resin of the Sagus sagu tree has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Sagus sagu include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and aid in wound healing, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Sagus sagu can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or oil, and is also used in traditional medicine to create ointments and salves.
